section.heading: Sums received by the Bureau of Land Management from vendors under enterprise information technology-procurements

content.p: Sums not to exceed 1 percent of the total value of procurements received by the Bureau of Land Management from vendors under enterprise information technology-procurements that the Department of the Interior and other Federal Government agencies may use to order information technology on and after March 11, 2009, may be deposited into the Management of Lands and Resources account to offset costs incurred in conducting the procurement.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 111–8, div. E, title I, Mar. 11, 2009, 123 Stat. 704.)

note.heading: Prior Similar Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:
Pub. L. 110–161, div. F, title I, Dec. 26, 2007, 121 Stat. 2101.
